title: The Escape Plan Tightens
description: On pages 11–13, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the escape plan tightens.
scene: The scene focuses on the escape plan tightens, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No, no, it will be me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Kin’emon- San!! Please allow me this one!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Take this- the world's smallest flower!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Even the courtesan uses NIN- JUTSU!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: OH!! It's falling!! I'll stop it!!

summary: The Escape Plan Tightens. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
